title: Better End Cities (VillageStyle)
description: Makes End Cities far more intricate, and contain more loot. All with Vanilla Blocks. And in the style of a village
body:
This datapack changes the look of end cities to be much larger, with more loot, and in this case, the cities now look like they were built by villagers. You can even find villagers and shulkers living together in these structures. 

The cities are also easier to navigate as the stairwells are more complete.
